reviews.comment:
No tengo vehiculo pero la visito ya que hay agua caliente gratis para el mate y los baños son limpios

I don't have a vehicle but I visit because there's free hot water for mate and the bathrooms are clean.

reviews.comment:
Es una ypf como cualquier otra..la diferencia es que está dentro del predio grande del club ACA.. cuenta con buffet, comidas, baños fuera, autoservicio... en el centro de la ciudad de mdp

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF gas station like any other... the difference is that it's inside the large grounds of the ACA club... it has a buffet, food, restrooms outside, self-service... in the center of Mar del Plata.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwLUpuYUVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Bien ... Pero como paso el domingo había cola de autos hasta la Av.
Uno supuso que había demasiada demanda, pero NO ... era que solo había DOS playeros y se ponían conversar con los clientes como si no hubiese nadie de tras en la espera.
Una pena que no estén supervisados

(Translated by Google)
Fine... But as it happened on Sunday, there was a line of cars all the way to the Av.
One assumed there was too much demand, but NO... it was just that there were only TWO beach attendants, and they were chatting with the customers as if there was no one waiting in the back.
It's a shame they're not supervised.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQweVBfVHlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Como es costumbre en el Automóvil Club Argentino la atención de su personal es muy buena, estan atentos a brindarte un muy buen servicio, las áreas de trabajo estan ordenadas, las instalaciones generales correctamente mantenidas. En el área donde sirven café y venta de productos comestibles tienen una excelente atención y una buena variedad de productos para satisfacer las necesidades que se presenten.

(Translated by Google)
As is customary at the Argentine Automobile Club, the staff is attentive and dedicated to providing excellent service. The work areas are organized and the general facilities are well maintained. The coffee and grocery areas offer excellent service and a good variety of products to meet any need.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwd0xyUjl3RRAB

(Translated by Google)
